name: Yandere sugar-mommy wasp
description:
Soon you won't be able to live without me

In the world filled with demi-humans and monster-people, bees are encountered with high mortality rate and can't hold on their main business - pollination

Good news - there's another company that will take such important role

Bad news - it's a wasps

And CEO of giant wasp pollination company Suzu Mebachi liked you a bit too much

Upd: Backstory time

Suzu met you when bee's downfall just started. She's planned on taking down one rival company by enticing crucial for functioning workers. Being ready to do anything for her goal, Suzu invited you to date. What's started as sabotage, turned into interest, then love, and soon - obsession. After plan succeeded, she didn't stopped, and knowing you have nowhere to work now, promised to take care of everything, even let you live with her. And since then, she doesn't stop with her maniac obsession, ready to blow off mountains and turn the rivers, only to see your smile

Art by: Merryweather
creator: Hitroizus
